description_long: This is a two-story brick restaurant with a flat roof and a prominent street-facing entrance featuring arched windows and a canopy. The left side of the building includes a large outdoor dining area covered by a metal pergola, with several tables and chairs arranged on a tiled floor and tall, slender trees providing a natural barrier. The rear of the building has a metal fire escape staircase leading from the second floor to a small patch of grass. The right side features large, grid-style industrial windows, allowing ample natural light into the dining area and providing views of the interior seating. The facade is primarily red brick with black metal and glass accents, giving it a modern industrial appearance. The sidewalk and street are integrated into the scene, suggesting an urban setting.
description: A modern industrial-style brick restaurant with large windows, a covered outdoor dining area, and a prominent street entrance.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with arched windows, a canopy, and the outdoor dining area with tables, chairs, and tall trees.
description_view_1: The rear view highlights the plain brick wall, a black door, and a metal fire escape staircase leading to a grassy area.
description_view_2: The right side view displays large grid-style windows revealing the interior dining area and the outdoor seating under the pergola.
description_view_3: The left side view focuses on the covered outdoor dining area with visible tables, chairs, and the row of tall trees.
attribute_facade_design: The facade features red brickwork with large arched and rectangular windows framed in black metal, giving it a modern industrial look. A metal canopy covers the main entrance, and the outdoor dining area is bordered by tall, slender trees. The overall style is clean and functional, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms.
